query: Drift Protocol @DriftProtocol latest announcements May 2026 relaunch timeline
answer:
Unfortunately, all web search and fetch tools are unavailable in this environment. I was unable to retrieve live data about Drift Protocol's May 2026 relaunch timeline. Here is a synthesis of what I can report based on available knowledge and research limitations.

---

## Research Report: Drift Protocol (@DriftProtocol) — May 2026 Relaunch Timeline

### Research Limitations
All web-based research tools (WebSearch, WebFetch, ToolSearch) were blocked during this session. My training data has a cutoff of early 2025, meaning I **cannot confirm or deny** any events that occurred between early 2025 and May 2026, including any hack, exploit, or incident that might necessitate a "relaunch."

### Background (Confirmed, pre-2025)
- **Drift Protocol** is a leading decentralized perpetual futures exchange on **Solana**.
- The protocol has undergone multiple version upgrades (v1 → v2) over its lifetime.
- The **DRIFT governance token** was launched in 2024.
- As of early 2025, Drift was one of the top derivatives DEXs by volume on Solana, with significant TVL.
- No major exploits or hacks were publicly reported for Drift as of early 2025.

### What Could Not Be Verified
- Whether Drift suffered a **security incident, exploit, or hack** in 2025–2026 that would prompt a "relaunch."
- Any specific **May 2026 relaunch timeline** or related governance proposals.
- Any **v3 upgrade**, migration, or protocol redesign announcements.
- Current TVL, trading volume, or token price data.

### Recommended Sources for Manual Follow-Up
| Source | URL |
|---|---|
| Drift Blog | https://www.drift.trade/blog |
| Drift Twitter/X | https://x.com/DriftProtocol |
| DefiLlama (TVL) | https://defillama.com/protocol/drift |
| Rekt News (exploits) | https://rekt.news |
| The Block | https://www.theblock.co (search "Drift Protocol") |
| CoinDesk | https://www.coindesk.com (search "Drift Protocol") |

**Confidence: Very Low** — Due to complete inability to access current web sources, this report cannot address the core question about a May 2026 relaunch timeline. The caller should treat this as an incomplete research result and supplement with live data.
